description: Petition of a teacher. Fragment of a letter written by a teacher, apparently to one of the parnasim of the qodesh. Insisting that he is in distress, the applicant evokes a decision of the Nagid, David b. Avraham, giving him the right to live in an apartment of the qodesh for the reduced rent of 12 dirhams. It appears that after having lived in it for 13 years, he is faced with a demand for increased rent. (Information from Gil, Documents of the Jewish Pious Foundations, pp.480-481, #146)
description_he: עצומת מורה לפרנס הקדש. מזכיר החלטת הנגיד דוד בן אברהם המאפשרת לו לגור בדירת הקדש בשכירות מוזלת של 12 דרהם; לאחר 13 שנה מתבקש לשלם יותר.
